case_title: NADINE ZELTZER RESPONDENT VS. FOREEVER WORKING LABOR (STEPHENS, WAYNE) APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: DEPT. 515: PRO TEM JUDGE NANCY J. NEWMAN, CLERK-BETH WILBER: C/C FOR TRIAL DE NOVO ON A SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL, PLAINTIFF NADINE ZELTZER APPEARS IN PRO PER, THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FOREVER WORKING LABOR, PLAINTIFF PRESENTS CASE AND MATTER IS SUBMITTED, COURT RULES FOR PLAINTIFF; SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2003 - OFF CALENDAR
RECORD ON APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT FOREEVER WORKING LABOR (STEPHENS, WAYNE) AS TO RESPONDENT ZELTZER, NADINE HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
PETITION FOR REHEARING FILED BY APPELLANT ORDER SENT TO JUDGE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2003 - CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZELTZER, NADINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOREEVER WORKING LABOR (STEPHENS, WAYNE) $670.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.37 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $717.37, CLERK'S CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL; SEE SCANNED DOC
PETITION FOR REHEARING IS DENIED WITH PREJUDICE.( JUDGMENT IS THE SAME)
